# AvökatFinder Slovakia
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Slovakia for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://slovakia.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Slovakia
- https://slovakia.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Slovakia
- https://slovakia.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Slovakia legal terms
- https://slovakia.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Slovakia
- https://slovakia.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Slovakia
- https://slovakia.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Slovakia
